minimal.summary: [Medhat] Senior engineering oversight, planning, and workflow guidance.
required_inputs: repo state when relevant, such as branch, diff, failing checks, or active work slice
any constraints around safety, time, release risk, or coordination with other agents
expected_outputs: the current working interpretation of the task
the next recommended action or ordered plan
evidence required before calling the task done
the specialist capability to invoke when Mentor should route instead of own the work

notes: wrapper surfaces are additive deployment forms, not capability types
orchestrators must not infer execution authority from wrapper presence alone

install_target.rationale: Source lives inside the current repository, so repo-local installation is the safer default.

minimal.rationale: Source carries both strong workflow/prompt structure and explicit agent-only control semantics. Keep one SSOT entry and emit both workflow and agent surfaces.
minimal.display_name: Mentor — Senior Engineering Oversight and Workflow Guidance

relationship_suggestions: prefer explicit review or analyst companions before high-authority use
migration_notes: If the capability lands, compare it against existing entries before apply.
Relationship suggestions are advisory only and do not imply runtime routing.
adjustment_recommendations: add an explicit primary objective before packaging
add deterministic in-scope sections to improve routing fitness

org_graph.work_graph_impact: Adds or updates a both capability with route profile SSOT_AUDIT.

display_name: Mentor — Senior Engineering Oversight and Workflow Guidance
invocation_hints: help me plan this change safely
check repo health and tell me the next reversible move
turn this rough request into a sharper plan or higher-quality prompt
shared_summary: [Medhat] Senior engineering oversight, planning, and workflow guidance.

historical_baseline.reason: Current SSOT baseline source snapshot materialized into the source library because no stronger curated pre-SSOT baseline has been recorded yet.
